warps.notes: South entrance left tile — leads back to Koga's Room
South entrance right tile — leads back to Koga's Room
North exit left tile — leads to Karen's Room. Locked until Bruno is defeated.
North exit right tile — leads to Karen's Room. Locked until Bruno is defeated.

notes: Map is 10 tiles wide x 18 tiles tall (5x9 blocks).
Bruno stands at (5,7) facing down — center of the room.
The north door at y=2 (tiles 4,2 and 5,2) starts as wall ($2a block). Changes to open door ($16) after Bruno is defeated.
The south entrance at y=14 (tile 4,14) is changed to wall ($2a) immediately upon player entry.
BrunosRoom_EnterMovement walks the player UP 4 steps after entering.
Bruno's palette is PAL_NPC_BROWN — the brown-skinned fighter aesthetic.
Bruno was also an Elite Four member in Gen 1. He has been in the Elite Four the longest of the current members.

trainers.name: Bruno
trainers.intro_dialogue: I am BRUNO of the ELITE FOUR. I always train to the extreme because I believe in our potential. That is how we became strong. Can you withstand our power? Hm? I see no fear in you. You look determined. Perfect for battle! Ready, <PLAYER>? You will bow down to our overwhelming power! Hoo hah!
trainers.post_defeat_dialogue: Having lost, I have no right to say anything... Go face your next challenge!

events.name: LockDoorBehindPlayer
events.description: SCENE_BRUNOSROOM_LOCK_DOOR fires sdefer BrunosRoomDoorLocksBehindYouScript. Player is walked UP 4 steps automatically, earthquake sound plays, and the south entrance door tile at (4,14) is changed to wall ($2a block). EVENT_BRUNOS_ROOM_ENTRANCE_CLOSED is set. Scene changes to SCENE_BRUNOSROOM_NOOP.

events.name: OpenExitDoor
events.description: After Bruno is beaten, EVENT_BEAT_ELITE_4_BRUNO is set. The north door tiles at (4,2) and (5,2) change to open ($16 block). EVENT_BRUNOS_ROOM_EXIT_OPEN is set. Player can then proceed to Karen's Room.

events.name: BrunosRoomDoorsCallback
events.description: On every map tile refresh: if EVENT_BRUNOS_ROOM_ENTRANCE_CLOSED is set, applies wall at (4,14). If EVENT_BRUNOS_ROOM_EXIT_OPEN is set, applies open door at (4,2).

notes: Bruno is Elite Four member #3, specializing in Fighting-type Pokemon. He is a returning Elite Four member from Gen 1 (Pokemon Red/Blue). His team is the most physically powerful of the four, featuring all three Hitmon variants plus a surprise Onix (Rock/Ground) and his ace Machamp (Lv.46) with Cross Chop. Hitmonchan's elemental punches (Thunder/Ice/Fire) cover a wide range of types. Bruno carries Max Potion as his battle item. Prize money: $4600 (base 25 × highest level 46 × 4).
